_about: Modeling configuration for the Santander-Pedreña-Somo line. The PDFs (timetable.json) only provide departure times + the (*) Pedreña-only flag + the effective date. Everything that is NOT printed on the PDF lives here: stop ids, crossing/dwell minutes, the publishing season window, Cantabria holidays, feed metadata, and the static El Puntal line (which has no PDF and is left untouched).

source._about: Where the published timetable lives. check_source.py fetches listing_url and alerts when the linked horario-*.pdf files drift from `pdfs` below (Los Reginas date-stamps every republish, e.g. horario-fines-de-semana-04.07.pdf, and swaps the link). extract.py reads these URLs directly by default, so the feed is sourced from the live PDFs — no PDF binaries are committed. When the watcher fires: update the URL(s) here, then `make build` and review the diff.

network._about: Travel model used to expand the published departure times into full stop_times. Times are deduced mathematically (see operator README).

season._about: Publishing window applied to the three ped_* calendars. start_date overrides the per-sheet 'a partir del' dates from the PDFs (kept as provenance in timetable.json). Bump these when the season changes.

fares._about: GTFS Fares v1, emitted by build.py into fare_attributes.txt + fare_rules.txt. Prices are from the operator's printed TARIFAS sheet; tickets are sold onboard / at the dock taquilla, so for trip planners this is informational. NOT watched by check_source.py (the tariff isn't among the source PDFs), so bump these by hand when the printed tariff changes. currency EUR; payment_method 0 = paid on board. Round trips (ida+vuelta) use transfers=1 so a single purchase covers the return crossing — but note Google Maps plans one-way journeys and will surface the one-way (ida) fare, not the return.

static._about: El Puntal line + puntal_2026 calendar: not derived from any PDF. build.py expands the `puntal` frequency spec below into explicit half-hourly trips (trip_id PUN_<HHMM><O|R>), so the build reproduces the whole line. calendar/calendar_dates are emitted verbatim. Any extra one-off rows can be added to `trips`/`stop_times` (prepended verbatim).

puntal._about: Half-hourly beach shuttle, single leg each way. Outbound departs Santander 10:30–19:00; return departs El Puntal 10:45–19:15 (both every 30 min). One 10-min crossing.
